title: LTcraft
body:
LTcraft server official modpack. The modpack focuses on adding an atmosphere of horror to your game. Despite this, the mod pack offers a colorful and interesting world to explore, several major mods in which you can spend many hours having fun with your friends.

---

## Main Gameplay Mods:
- Hex Casting
- Create
- Ad Astra

---

## Main Horror Mods:
- Cave Dweller
- Doctor Who - Weeping Angels
- From The Fog
- Nyctophobia Dread
- The Man From The Fog

---

## Semi-horror Mods / Spooky Mods:
- Aylyth
- Beneath the Wetlands
- Dark Waters
- Nyctophobia
- The Graveyard
- Whisperwoods

---

## Spooky Atmospheric Mods / Visual Mods:
- Cave Dust
- Presence Footsteps
- Spawn Animations
- True Darkness
- AmbientSounds
- Fog Looks Good Now

---

## World Generation / World Additional Structures Mods:
- Additional Structures
- Paradise Lost
- BetterEnd
- BetterNether
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
- Deeper Oceans
- End Remastered
- Hearths
- Incendium
- More Geodes
- Oh The Biomes You'll Go
- Regions Unexplored
- River Redux
- Sky Villages
- Tectonic
- Terralith
- Towns and Towers
- YUNG's Series of Mods





<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This modpack is suitable for both single player and online play. It is regularly updated with new mods and content.

</details>
